provenance.prompt: oil painting, semi-realistic painterly character concept art, muted dusty palette, subtle dark edges, soft upper-left directional lighting, worn and functional aesthetic, lived-in sci-fi, visible material texture and surface grain, visible brushstrokes, full body visible, front-facing standing pose, isolated on plain dark grey background, gentle-faced female reptilian alien with warm amber-brown scales and a smooth crest ridge, large calm amber eyes, a relaxed tail, wearing practical dark leather tunic with many pockets over a warm brown fabric undergarment, soft boots, a carrying harness designed to hold small things against the chest, a temperature monitoring device on her wrist, she tends the hatchery and her clothing is designed for warmth and softness not combat, the leather is supple not stiff — she is the gentlest person in the most martial civilization
provenance.negative_prompt: photorealistic, photograph, photo, stock photo, 3d render, smooth CG, CGI, octane render, unreal engine, anime, cartoon, chibi, bright saturated colors, clean pristine new clothing, glamorous, heroic pose, dynamic action pose, multiple characters, busy background, environmental background, landscape, text, watermark, blurry, low quality, extra limbs, deformed, medieval knight, human face, mammalian features, fur, hair, ears

judgment.explanation: Veshan faction. Forged material vocabulary with overlapping scales, dark bronze plate, leather underpadding. Martial culture expressed through gear.
